title: i18n sweep: agent dashboard page (ZAI-167)
description:
## Scope

Board reported residual English hardcode on the agent dashboard page, e.g. `http://127.0.0.1:3105/{prefix}/agents/{agent}/dashboard`.

Do a full sweep of the page and ALL files it renders for hardcoded English. Localize through `t()` and add keys to all 8 locales (en, ru, de, el, es, pt, uk, zh). Pay special attention to:

- Dropdown menus (including nested submenus)
- Tabs and sub-tabs (Dashboard / Instructions / Skills / Configuration / Runs / Budget)
- Hover tooltips and aria-labels
- Buttons: 'Assign Task', 'Run Heartbeat', 'Pause', status pills like 'Бездействует', 'Latest Run', 'View details →', 'See All →', 'Run Activity', 'Issues by Priority', 'Issues by Status', 'Success Rate', 'Recent Issues', 'Costs', table headers (Date, Run, Input, Output, Cost), 'Last 14 days', priority labels (Критический/Высокий/Средний/Низкий)
- Date formatting / relative time strings

## Critical: workspace safety

**Per memory ZAI-163/164: verify cwd is the FORK (`paperclip_fork_Enterprise`), NOT upstream public repo, before any commit.** Run `git remote -v` and `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` first.

## Acceptance criteria

- Zero English leaks on the agent dashboard page when locale=ru (and other non-en locales)
- All 8 locale files updated with new keys
- Branch `vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization` (current i18n branch) — commit there
- Post a sweep report in a comment listing files touched and keys added

## Parent
ZAI-167 (board request, Russian).
